name: bodytrack
description: Aplicativo para leitura de QR Code de equipamentos de análise corporal

scripts.vercel-build: npm run build:web && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync('web/dist','dist',{recursive:true});"
scripts.dev:desktop: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web && electron-builder
